Package org.eventb.core.seqprover

Interface IProofTreeChangedListener

All Known Subinterfaces:
IProofState
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractProofTreeTests, ProofDependenciesTests, ProofState, ProofTreeDeltaTests, ProofTreeTests, ProofTreeUIContentProvider, RebuildTests, RewriteHypActionTacticTest, TypeTests
public interface IProofTreeChangedListener
Common protocol for proof tree change listeners.

A listener receives notification of changes to a proof tree maintained by the sequent prover.

This interface may be implemented by clients.

Since:
1.0

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    proofTreeChanged(IProofTreeDelta delta)
    Notifies that the observed proof tree has changed.

  • Method Details

    • proofTreeChanged

      void proofTreeChanged(IProofTreeDelta delta)
      Notifies that the observed proof tree has changed. The specific details of the change are described by the given delta.
      Parameters:
      delta - description of the change to the observed proof tree
